label: Job giver AI ability fight
description: Combat job giver that uses a specific ability to engage enemies. Inherits all AIFightBase targeting fields.

ability.label: Ability
ability.description: The ability this job giver uses to fight enemies.

skipIfCantTargetNow.label: Skip if can't target now
skipIfCantTargetNow.description: If true, skips job generation when the ability is on cooldown or cannot currently target an enemy.
